title: ampacus obtusifolia
intro: Ampacus obtusifolia, also known as the blunt-leaved Ampacus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Ampacus obtusifolia include reducing pain and swelling, as well as acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Ampacus obtusifolia often involve boiling the roots and leaves in water or using them in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
